title: oestlundorchis pandurata
intro: Oestlundorchis pandurata, also known as the Oestlund orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is a terrestrial orchid native to the eastern United States, often found growing in woodland areas. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oestlundorchis pandurata include soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, and it can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
